title: strophanthus robustus
intro: Strophanthus robustus, also known as the robust strophanthus, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Strophanthus robustus include its ability to stimulate the heart and increase its pumping efficiency, making it a potential treatment for heart failure and certain cardiovascular conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its use in reducing blood pressure and improving circulation, as well as its potential to lower the risk of heart-related complications. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through extraction and infusion, often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for cardiovascular health.
